latin: 'scis,' inquit Arthurus, 'temporibus huius modi, cum in cataracta Vogoniana captus sum cum homine Betelgeusensi, et mox in spatio profundo suffocatione moriturus — tunc vere vellem audivisse quae mater mea mihi dixerit cum parvus eram.' 'cur, quid tibi dixit?' 'nescio. non audivi.'

questions.prompt: What did Arthur wish he had done?
questions.target: Listened to what his mother told him
choices: Listened to what his mother told him

questions.prompt: Why didn't Arthur know what his mother said?
choices: He was too young to remember

translation: 'You know,' said Arthur, 'at times like this, when I'm trapped in a Vogon airlock with a man from Betelgeuse, and about to die of asphyxiation in deep space — I really wish I had listened to what my mother told me when I was young.' 'Why, what did she tell you?' 'I don't know. I didn't listen.'
